name: Grass Wonder
description: A member of Team Rigil. Though born in America, her parents' love of Japanese culture influenced her to also love all things to do with the country—to the point of being called the spitting image of the ideal Japanese beauty. She speaks in a friendly manner and is easy to get along with, but her will is firm. Her determination to win is second to none. She shares a room with her close friend, El Condor Pasa.

name: Gwang-nam Jang
description: __Height:__ 188 cm The protagonist of the Korean webtoon series 'Hellper.' Gwangnam, whom is the leader of Killerboros; a gang that helps individuals in need and designs clothes, is killed off by an unknown individual in a truck at the start of the series. Being the leader of a 'gang' as big as Killerboros, Gwangnam is an individual adored by many, and for good reason, given his selfless attitude. name: Mahmut Tughril
nativeName: 犬鷲のマフムート将軍
description: The youngest member of the council of generals, from a tribe of expert falconers. The death of his mother in the war with the Baltlein Empire drove him to pass the army entrance test at age twelve, and seek continued peace for Turkey. Directs a half-tamed falcon, Iskandar, to deadly effect, and can even command a flock of falcons by luring them in with meat.

description: __Height:__ 161cm A young woman who acts as Kiritsugu Emiya's assistant during the fourth Holy Grail War.
